title: Metformin Study
abstract: Metformin reduced HbA1c levels in elderly diabetic patients and showed favorable safety outcomes.

title: Insulin Study
abstract: Insulin therapy improved glucose control but increased weight gain in some patients.

title: Aspirin Study
abstract: Aspirin reduced cardiovascular events among high-risk populations.

title: Statin Study
abstract: Statins lowered LDL cholesterol and reduced cardiovascular risk.

title: Hypertension Study
abstract: ACE inhibitors demonstrated effective blood pressure control in elderly populations.
